allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "=== git config \(PowerShell/Windows git\) ==="; foreach \($k in @\('core.autocrlf','core.filemode','core.ignorecase','core.excludesfile'\)\) { $v = git config --get $k; if \(-not $v\) { $v = '\(unset\)' }; "{0,-20} {1}" -f $k, $v }; Write-Output "=== git status --short \(PowerShell\) ==="; git status --short; Write-Output "=== git --version & which ==="; git --version; \(Get-Command git\).Source)

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Windows HOME/USERPROFILE ==="; Write-Output $HOME; Write-Output $env:USERPROFILE; Write-Output "=== resolved global ignore + check-ignore ==="; git check-ignore -v .claude/settings.json .claude/settings.local.json 2>$null; if \(-not $?\) { Write-Output "\(nothing ignored\)" }; Write-Output "=== global ignore file exists? ==="; Test-Path "$HOME\\.config\\git\\ignore")
